D4 Colorimetry L5 Evaluate Reference

CIEDE2000 — The Weighted Difference

move a sample near a blue reference and watch the lightness, chroma, hue, and rotation terms that bend ΔE76 into ΔE2000

CIEDE2000 keeps the Euclidean idea but reweights each axis — SL, SC, SH — and adds a rotation term RT that couples chroma and hue. RT only wakes up near the blue region (h ≈ 275°), correcting a known CIELAB failure.

Drag the sample around the blue reference. The bars show each weighted term; the rotation term turns red when RT is active. Compare the plain ΔE76 with ΔE2000 — they diverge most exactly here, in the blues.
